sections.biography-source-undefined: Chunyu Jia was from Jinan commandery. He became Excellency of Works on August 18, 191;[HouHanJi26] his post before that is disputed by sources. The HouHanJi claims he served as Minister of the Household, but the HouHanShu claims he served as Brilliantly Blessed Grandee (光祿大夫). On September 21, 192, he was promoted to Excellency over the Masses. He attended Emperor Xian when the emperor came of age on February 24, 194 and was the honored guest, being gifted black and light red cloth as well as a team of four horses.[Tongdian56] He resigned from his post in the ninth lunar month.[HHS10] He resigned because he had been ill for a long time.[HouHanJi27] Nothing more is known about him.

full_text:
Chunyu Jia 淳于嘉
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chunyu Jia (淳于嘉)was born in Ji’nan. Served the Han in senior civil posts. Chunyu Jia was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Dong Zhuo, and Li Jue.

BiographySource Undefined
Chunyu Jia was from Jinan commandery. He became Excellency of Works on August 18, 191;[HouHanJi26] his post before that is disputed by sources. The HouHanJi claims he served as Minister of the Household, but the HouHanShu claims he served as Brilliantly Blessed Grandee (光祿大夫). On September 21, 192, he was promoted to Excellency over the Masses. He attended Emperor Xian when the emperor came of age on February 24, 194 and was the honored guest, being gifted black and light red cloth as well as a team of four horses.[Tongdian56] He resigned from his post in the ninth lunar month.[HHS10] He resigned because he had been ill for a long time.[HouHanJi27] Nothing more is known about him.
